pr.title: Record: 11L Next-Gen Stack + Custom Kernels, val_bpb=1.1399

output.summary: 11-layer transformer blends GQA/XSA/NTK-RoPE with Muon tuning, int5+zstd compression, and fused kernels for sliding-window evaluation.
techniques: Custom Triton kernels fusing RMSNorm+QKV, ReLU² MLP, and softcap+CE
Int5 quantization with Late QAT STE plus zstd-22 compression
Muon optimizer with orthogonal init, muP scaling, NTK-aware RoPE, and XSA on final layers
